privileged_info_summary: The task is a WiFi coverage heatmap planning exercise using draw.io (version 26.0.9). All file paths are verified: floorplan at /home/ga/Desktop/office_floorplan.png, specs at /home/ga/Desktop/wifi_project_specs.txt, working file at /home/ga/Diagrams/wifi_project.drawio, and export at /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/wifi_coverage_map.png. The task requires 3 layers named exactly 'Floor Plan', 'Hardware', and 'Coverage', with the Floor Plan layer locked. Agents must place 3 Wireless Access Point icons and 3 semi-transparent coverage circles (opacity < 100%, ideally 30-50%). The floorplan image is synthetically generated at runtime as an 800x600 PNG with rooms including Lobby, Conference Room, Server Room, and Bullpen. draw.io files use Deflate-compressed XML in Base64 encoding. The success threshold is 70 points out of 100.
